title: JobRequest
description: Body of POST /jobs. Mirrored by Swift Codable and Python pydantic models.

text.description: Story plain text. v1 target range 2000-4000 words.

race_hint.description: Optional appearance/race hint used only when the text does not describe the character.

vram_mode.description: concurrent: LLM+FLUX resident together (>=80GB). sequenced: LLM then free then FLUX.

consistency_mode.description: kontext: FLUX.1-Kontext-dev depth-1 fan-out (default). lora: per-character anime LoRA.
